required_complexity_patterns.notes: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element

reference_templates.title: Question number prefixes
reference_templates.notes: Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Question prefixes

reference_templates.title: Form inside dialog
reference_templates.notes: Application fields live inside a native dialog element
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Dialog form

reference_templates.title: Asterisk in sibling span
reference_templates.notes: Required marker asterisk lives in sibling span, not inside label text
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Sibling asterisk

*

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Reference DOM (Question number prefixes): Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers Reference DOM (Form inside dialog): Application fields live inside a native dialog element Reference DOM (Asterisk in sibling span): Required marker asterisk lives in sibling span, not inside label text Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: glued-label-text, custom-combobox, iframe-apply, div-role-textbox, aria-label-only. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: sidebar + main split apply layout. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Question number prefixes; Form inside dialog; Asterisk in sibling span.
